signal_title: Formal Proceedings Against X (formerly Twitter) Under the DSA
risk_rationale: The regulatory signal indicates a formal proceeding under the DSA focusing on content moderation and transparency, which aligns with TikTok's existing obligations under the DSA transparency report (CM-010) and Community Guidelines report (CM-011). The risk is moderate as it involves an assessment of compliance rather than immediate enforcement action.

compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Assessment of compliance with DSA obligations
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Potential gap in the frequency or detail of transparency reporting as required by the DSA.

compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Evaluation of transparency in content moderation
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Potential gap in the transparency of content moderation practices as evaluated under the DSA.

remediations.title: Enhance Transparency Reporting
remediations.description: Review and enhance the detail and frequency of transparency reports to ensure full compliance with DSA requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Updated transparency reports meet DSA requirements
Reports are submitted within required timelines

business_impact: Moderate impact due to potential need for increased transparency and reporting efforts, which may require additional resources.
recommended_actions: Conduct a detailed review of current transparency reporting practices
Engage with EU regulators to clarify specific DSA requirements
Prepare to adjust reporting practices to align with DSA obligations
